title: oxytropis deflexa var. sericea
intro: Oxytropis deflexa var. sericea, also known as silky globeflower, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The silky globeflower is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used to treat a range of conditions, from urinary issues to skin problems.
